title: Jarul’s Legend Is Challenged
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Unknown person #1, Hajrudin, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Jarul as Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.
scene: Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's hurry to the lift!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Abnormal Haki emanates from the realm of the 'Sun...I

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gerd, WE'LL LEAVE THIS SACK OF filth IN YOUR CARE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Got it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Be careful!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I shall dedicate all my might to this, Gerd-TASO!!

dialogue.speaker: Hajrudin
dialogue.text: Hajrudin, move it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's get going!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'd better stay too, Luffy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Jarul's wounds are too severe; we can't move him yet.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Got it! I'll leave it to you!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey... Straw hat Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Your use of conqueror's Haki... is impressive.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: be mindful of it... those guys are by no means invulnerable.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Thanks! You can count on me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll save colon and his friends no matter what!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: gyaban, that just made it click for me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wasn't able to put it into words before... My own power...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm the only one left who's faced these knights before, I know I can beat them!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: FREE ME AND TAKE ME WITH YOU, HAJRUDIN!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You fighting for Elbalf?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Like I'd ever take you with us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's another in your group who uses conqueror's Haki...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Is it me?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I knew it! With how things were going, mosshead and jinbe were about to usurp me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You there, swordsman... your body seems to be growing accustomed to it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I have conqueror's Haki?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What?! You didn't know?! It's beenoozing off you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How absurd... Haki is a power that must be understood and tamed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Your captain is one of the four emperors, 'You should be meticulous if 'you intend to have his back!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: My bad...

summary: This part advances the The Giants Turn on Their Legend through 31 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
